data.title: Startale CEO: Meme coin has become the main use case in the current crypto industry, and this problem must be solved
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Sota Watanabe, CEO of Startale, said in a post on X: "When I entered the cryptocurrency industry about 10 years ago, I was excited about how technology could empower people and improve society. Now, 10 years later, the main use case of this industry is Meme coin. I don't deny this situation, but this problem must be solved."

data.title: The Argentine president has set up a working group to investigate LIBRA-related parties and asked the anti-corruption office to intervene
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: The Argentine Presidential Office issued a statement on LIBRA on X: "On October 19, President Miley met with representatives of KIP Protocol in Argentina, where he learned that the company intends to develop a project called Viva la Libertad to use blockchain technology to finance private enterprises in the Argentine Republic. 
The president attended the meeting, which has been officially recorded in the public hearing register. Participants included KIP Protocol company representatives Mauricio Novellli and Julian Peh and presidential spokesman Manuel Adorni. 
In this context, on January 30, 2025, the president held a meeting with Hayden Mark Davis at the Rose Palace. According to representatives of KIP Protocol, Davis will provide technical infrastructure for his project. Davis has no relationship with the Argentine government in the past and present, and KIP Protocol representatives introduced him as one of the partners in the project. 
Finally, yesterday, the president shared a post on his personal account announcing the launch of KIP KIP Protocol project, as he does every day with many entrepreneurs who want to launch projects in Argentina to create jobs and obtain investments. Since he is not involved in the development of any cryptocurrency, after the repercussions of the launch of the project, in order to avoid any speculation and not to spread it further, he decided to delete the post.
In view of the facts, President Milley decided to immediately ask the Anti-Corruption Office (OA) to intervene to determine whether there has been any misconduct by any member of the National Government, including the President himself.
On the other hand, the President decided to set up an Investigative Task Force (UTI) within the Presidential Palace, composed of representatives of institutions and organizations related to crypto assets, financial activities, money laundering and other related fields, who will consolidate information and launch an urgent investigation into the launch of LIBRA and all companies or individuals involved in the above-mentioned actions.
All information collected during the investigation will be handed over to the court to determine whether any company or individual related to the KIP Protocol project has committed a crime. President Milley has demonstrated his commitment to the truth with his actions and he is committed to thoroughly clarifying the truth of this incident until the final results are revealed. ”

data.title: Gold-backed tokens like PAXG underperformed this week while Wall Street raised its gold price target
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News This week, gold-backed cryptocurrencies have performed poorly as their prices have fallen sharply after rising more than 10% so far this year.
Gold-backed tokens including Paxos gold (PAXG) and Tether gold (XAUT) fell about 1% in the past week, trading around $2,900, while the overall cryptocurrency market rebounded. The CoinDesk 20 Index rose 5.7% over the same period, and the broader MarketVector Digital Asset 100 Index (MVDA) rose 3.4%.
Analysis pointed out that as more and more people speculated that the new tariffs threatened by Trump were just a negotiating tool, gold prices fell, hitting the prices of safe-haven assets including gold and the US dollar.
However, according to a recent report from Morgan Stanley, the recent decline in gold may still provide "opportunities" for those seeking to hedge against the backdrop of global reflation, geopolitical tensions and increasing fiscal spending. It recently raised its forecast for gold prices.
Citi strategists recently raised their short-term gold price target to $3,000 and their average forecast for this year to $2,900. Meanwhile, UBS has raised its 12-month gold target to $3,000 an ounce. (CoinDesk)

data.title: Argentine President Calls For Investigation Into Blockchain Project
data.description:
According to Foresight News, the Argentine President's Office announced that President Javier Milei met with representatives of KIP Protocol in Argentina on October 19 last year. During the meeting, the company outlined plans to develop a blockchain-based project named 'Viva la Libertad,' aimed at providing financial support to private enterprises in Argentina. This meeting has been officially recorded in public hearing records, with attendees including the Argentine President, KIP Protocol representative Julian Peh, and presidential spokesperson Manuel Adoni.

In this context, on January 30, 2025, President Milei held discussions with Hayden Mark Davis at the Casa Rosada. According to KIP Protocol representatives, Davis will provide technical infrastructure for the project. Mr. Davis has no past or present affiliations with the Argentine government and is involved solely as a project partner for KIP Protocol.

Yesterday, President Milei shared the announcement of the KIP Protocol project launch on his personal social media account, similar to his routine support for Argentine entrepreneurs focused on job creation and investment attraction. However, to prevent speculation and undue attention, the post has since been deleted, as the President is not involved in the cryptocurrency's development.

In light of these developments, President Milei has requested the Anti-Corruption Office (OA) to investigate whether any government members, including himself, have engaged in misconduct. All evidence gathered from the investigation will be handed over to judicial authorities to determine if any companies or individuals associated with the KIP Protocol project have committed any crimes.

data.title: BNB Drops Below 660 USDT with a 0.29% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Feb 16, 2025, 02:14 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has dropped below 660 USDT and is now trading at 659.280029 USDT, with a narrowed 0.29% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: US media: Broadcom and TSMC are eyeing Intel spin-off deal
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to people familiar with the matter, Broadcom (AVGO.O) and TSMC (TSM.N) are each eyeing a potential deal that could split Intel (INTC.O) in two. Broadcom has been keeping a close eye on Intel's chip design and marketing business and has informally discussed a bid with consultants, but may only bid after finding a partner for Intel's manufacturing business. Broadcom has not yet submitted any documents to Intel. TSMC has been studying controlling some or all of Intel's chip factories, possibly as part of an investor consortium or other structure. Broadcom and TSMC are not working together. Splitting Intel would put it in line with the industrial shift in recent decades, either specializing in chip manufacturing or chip design, not both. People familiar with the matter said that Intel's interim executive chairman Frank Yeary has been leading discussions with possible acquirers and Trump administration officials, who are concerned about the fate of the company, which is seen as critical to national security. People familiar with the matter said that negotiations about Intel's factories are in the early stages and the Trump administration has asked TSMC to explore the idea. (WSJ)

data.title: Over 30 U.S. States Implement Bitcoin And Digital Asset Policies In 2025
data.description: According to Odaily, Dennis Porter, co-founder of the Satoshi Action Fund (SAF), announced on X that more than 30 states in the United States have introduced policies supporting Bitcoin and digital assets in 2025.

data.title: Analysis: If Bitcoin closes above $96,337 in Q1, Strategy is expected to be included in the S&P 500 index in the first half of the year
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Strategy (MSTR) is expected to be included in the S&P 500 index by June 20. Currently, the company meets all eligibility requirements, except for one: positive GAAP net income in the past 12 months (the last four quarters combined). To qualify, the company's earnings in the first quarter of 2025 must be high enough to offset the losses in the previous three quarters. This goal can be achieved by adopting the (now mandatory) Financial Accounting Standards Board (FASB) digital asset accounting rules.
To do this, Bitcoin needs to close in the first quarter above the company's average purchase price of $96,337 during those three months. A closing price below that level would force Strategy to record a loss, perhaps preventing it from being included in the S&P 500 index. (CoinDesk)

data.title: Analysis: 70% of LIBRA supply is in 2 addresses, and the issuance-related addresses hold over $100 million USDC and SOL
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to Arkham monitoring, 70% of LIBRA's supply is in 2 addresses, while 15% of the supply is deposited directly into Meteora LP by developer addresses. Developer addresses have collected more than $20 million in transaction fees from these deposits. 
In addition, 7 different addresses received a total of 60 million LIBRA from deployers, each of which deposited LIBRA into the liquidity pool and later withdrew SOL/USDC funds. 
Addresses associated with LIBRA issuance currently hold more than $100 million in USDC and SOL, most of which have been transferred to independent holding addresses. LIBRA-related accounts currently hold $57.6 million in USDC and $48.6 million in SOL.

data.title: SAF Lianchuang: More than 30 states in the United States have introduced policies to support Bitcoin and digital assets this year
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Dennis Porter, co-founder of Satoshi Action Fund (SAF), wrote on X: "In 2025, more than 30 states in the United States will introduce policies to support Bitcoin and digital assets."
